title: ACME Pebble Testing Design
summary: Design and implementation notes for restoring live ACME protocol tests using Pebble with a custom root CA via instant-acme 0.8.4.
notes: Design/implementation doc (Status: IMPLEMENTED) with prose plus code snippets and API changes; no Decision/Consequences structure (not ADR) and no user stories (not PRD). Contains some contract-like API definitions but reads as implementation rationale, so classified DOC over SPEC.
